questions.question: Which routing protocol uses path vector logic?
questions.description: BGP is a path vector protocol used for routing between autonomous systems.

questions.question: Which protocol prevents switching loops in Ethernet networks?
questions.description: Spanning Tree Protocol blocks redundant paths to prevent loops.

questions.question: Which DNS record maps a hostname to an IPv6 address?
questions.description: AAAA records map names to IPv6 addresses.
